description: Historical incident postmortems. Recurring patterns intentionally repeat; match symptoms here against live telemetry to recognize known failure modes.

incidents.title: Intermittent payment failures traced to DNS resolution
incidents.symptoms: Sporadic UnknownHostException for api.globalpay-gateway.com; errors cleared on retry; no provider-side incident.
incidents.root_cause: CoreDNS upstream resolver intermittently timing out; ndots/search-domain misconfig amplifying lookups.
incidents.remediation: Increased CoreDNS cache TTL and replicas; added dnsConfig with reduced ndots; enabled NodeLocal DNSCache.
incidents.prevention: NodeLocal DNSCache everywhere; alert on DNS lookup latency; pre-resolve provider host on startup.

incidents.title: Cache stampede after Redis eviction storm
incidents.symptoms: Sudden DB load spike, latency cliff, redis hit-rate collapse following mass key expiry.
incidents.root_cause: Synchronized TTL expiry caused thundering herd to backend DB (no jitter, no request coalescing).
incidents.remediation: Added TTL jitter, request coalescing (single-flight), pre-warmed hot keys.
incidents.prevention: TTL jitter standard; single-flight on cache miss; soft-TTL with async refresh.

incidents.title: Bad deployment config caused resource exhaustion
incidents.symptoms: Error-rate spike immediately after deploy; resource timeouts; recovered on rollback.
incidents.root_cause: Deployment shipped misconfigured pool/limit value; under-provisioned a shared resource.
incidents.remediation: Rolled back to previous version; corrected config; re-deployed with canary.
incidents.prevention: Config diff review gate; canary + automated rollback on error-rate SLO breach.

incidents.title: Payment authorizations failing — external provider degraded
incidents.symptoms: Spike in payment authorization errors; checkout success rate dropped; provider returning 5xx / timeouts.
incidents.root_cause: External payment provider (api.globalpay-gateway.com) regional degradation; upstream gateway latency > 10s.
incidents.remediation: Failed over to secondary provider region; enabled payment retry queue; provider resolved within 90m.
incidents.prevention: Add multi-provider failover; circuit-breaker around provider; synthetic provider health checks.

incidents.title: Payment authorizations failing — external provider degraded
incidents.symptoms: Spike in payment authorization errors; checkout success rate dropped; provider returning 5xx / timeouts.
incidents.root_cause: External payment provider (api.globalpay-gateway.com) regional degradation; upstream gateway latency > 10s.
incidents.remediation: Failed over to secondary provider region; enabled payment retry queue; provider resolved within 90m.
incidents.prevention: Add multi-provider failover; circuit-breaker around provider; synthetic provider health checks.

incidents.title: Redis cluster failover spiked checkout latency
incidents.symptoms: Cache connection errors, latency spike as calls fall back to DB, intermittent timeouts.
incidents.root_cause: ElastiCache node failover; client pool exhausted / slow to reconnect; no graceful degradation.
incidents.remediation: Client reconnect tuning, raised pool size, added cache-miss fallback with timeouts and bulkheads.
incidents.prevention: Multi-AZ Redis with fast failover; client-side circuit breaker; degrade-gracefully on cache loss.

incidents.title: Bad deployment config caused resource exhaustion
incidents.symptoms: Error-rate spike immediately after deploy; resource timeouts; recovered on rollback.
incidents.root_cause: Deployment shipped misconfigured pool/limit value; under-provisioned a shared resource.
incidents.remediation: Rolled back to previous version; corrected config; re-deployed with canary.
incidents.prevention: Config diff review gate; canary + automated rollback on error-rate SLO breach.

incidents.title: Node resource contention degraded latency
incidents.symptoms: Latency p99 rose on a subset of pods; CPU throttling metrics elevated; no error spike.
incidents.root_cause: Co-located batch job saturated node CPU; missing CPU limits / anti-affinity.
incidents.remediation: Evicted batch workload, set requests/limits, added anti-affinity.
incidents.prevention: Right-size requests/limits; separate batch node pool; throttling alerts.

incidents.title: Kafka consumer lag delayed inventory sync
incidents.symptoms: Growing consumer lag on inventory.sync; stale stock counts; delayed order state transitions.
incidents.root_cause: Consumer throughput < produce rate after traffic growth; slow DB writes in consumer; frequent rebalances.
incidents.remediation: Scaled consumer group, increased partitions, batched DB writes, tuned max.poll.records.
incidents.prevention: Alert on consumer lag SLO; autoscale consumers on lag; idempotent + batched processing.

incidents.title: Database connection saturation under peak load
incidents.symptoms: Rising query latency, connection wait timeouts, 'too many clients already' errors, error-rate climb.
incidents.root_cause: Connection pool sized beyond DB max_connections during traffic peak; long-running queries holding connections.
incidents.remediation: Reduced per-pod pool size, added PgBouncer, killed long-running queries, scaled read replicas.
incidents.prevention: Capacity model pool_size*replicas < max_connections; PgBouncer in front of all PG; query timeouts.

incidents.title: Memory leak caused recurring pod OOMKills
incidents.symptoms: Heap usage climbs over days, GC pauses lengthen, pods OOMKilled and restart, sawtooth memory graph.
incidents.root_cause: Unbounded in-memory cache / listener accumulation; objects never evicted.
incidents.remediation: Rolling restart for relief; bounded cache size + eviction; heap dump analysis to find retention.
incidents.prevention: Bounded caches with eviction; memory-leak canary (long-soak); alert on heap-after-GC trend.

incidents.title: TLS certificate expiration broke service-to-service calls
incidents.symptoms: Sudden TLS handshake failures at a fixed timestamp; clients see certificate expired errors.
incidents.root_cause: Internal mTLS / egress certificate expired; auto-renewal job had silently failed weeks earlier.
incidents.remediation: Rotated certificate manually; restarted affected pods; fixed cert-manager renewal job.
incidents.prevention: Alert at 21/14/7 days to expiry; monitor cert-manager renewal job; shorter-lived auto-rotated certs.
